english: Salutations to Narasimha, the delight of Prahlada
Whose nails are like chisels on the stone-like chest of Hiranyakashipu

hindi: इतो नृसिंहः परतो नृसिंहः, यतो यतो यामि ततो नृसिंहः।
english: Here is Narasimha, beyond is Narasimha, wherever I go there is Narasimha
roman: Ito Nrisimhah parato Nrisimhah, yato yato yami tato Nrisimhah

hindi: बहिर्नृसिंहो हृदये नृसिंहः, नृसिंहमादिं शरणं प्रपद्ये॥
english: Outside is Narasimha, in the heart is Narasimha — I take refuge in the primordial Narasimha
roman: Bahir Nrisimho hridaye Nrisimhah, Nrisimham adim sharanam prapadye

english: The fierce, heroic, great Vishnu, blazing, all-faced
roman: Ugram Viram Maha Vishnum jvalantam sarvatom ukham

english: Narasimha the fearsome and auspicious, death to death — I bow to him

hindi: नृसिंह कवचं पुण्यं यः पठेत् सततं नरः।
english: This sacred Narasimha Kavacham — whoever reads it always
roman: Nrisimha kavacham punyam yah pathet satatam narah

english: Attains the world of Vishnu and rejoices with Vishnu
roman: Sa Vishnuloka mapnoti Vishnuna saha modate
